title: Circle's Stablecoin Freeze Policy Clarified
summary: Circle will only freeze its stablecoin with a court order or law enforcement direction, clarifying its stance on asset control during crypto thefts.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the balance between decentralization and regulatory compliance in the stablecoin market.

title: OpenClaw: The Rise of China's AI Agent Economy
summary: OpenClaw's success signals the growth of China's AI agent economy, driven by install queues, side hustles, and stock bets.

title: Americans' Economic Sentiment Plummets
summary: Americans are feeling increasingly negative about the economy, largely due to rising costs, particularly at the gas pump.

title: Wall Street's Optimism Contrasts Consumer Gloom

title: Meta's AI Push: Layoffs and Wage Suppression?

title: Analyst Predicts Tesla Stock Crash
